scope: ACL 2027 main PDF page 4 proxy-similarity gate story polish

source_changes.change: Reframed the Section 4.1 proxy-similarity paragraph as a deliberately narrow screening gate that permits task-proximal checks but does not establish VLM-grounding reliability.

visual_review.finding: The page-4 Results opening now makes the proxy gate's role explicit before the VLM section. The rewrite leaves the 11-page structure unchanged: Section 4.2 still starts on page 4, Figure 2 stays at the top of page 5, and the page-5 text flow remains visually stable.
visual_review.reader_effect: The transition from proxy similarity to task-proximal VLM checks reads as a story gate: visual closeness clears the screening step but cannot close the grounding question.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/main.pdf tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round24_after/main.txt && rg -n "The first result is deliberately narrow|This clears the screening gate|permission to run task-proximal checks" tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round24_after/main.txt
verification.result: all three updated proxy-gate phrases found in extracted PDF text

residual_risk: Focused page-4 main-paper story polish only; not a full final-upload audit, supplement-wide wording cleanup, or metadata/title change.
